hero.title: Pugliesi nel Mondo UK
hero.subtitle: International Association of Apulians in the World
hero.description: Connecting Apulians in the United Kingdom to celebrate and promote the culture, traditions, art and gastronomy of Puglia.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Pugliesi nel Mondo UK was founded to build a bridge between Puglia and the United Kingdom. We are a non-profit charity that brings together Apulians and lovers of Puglia to preserve and share the cultural heritage of our land: from music to gastronomy, from art to tradition, from language to the values that make us unique.

items.title: Cultural Events
items.description: We organise festivals, cultural evenings and gatherings celebrating Apulian traditions in London and across the UK.

items.title: Community
items.description: We create a support network for Apulians in the UK, fostering connections and opportunities to meet.

items.title: Traditions
items.description: We promote Apulian traditions: the pizzica, gastronomy, craftsmanship and folk festivals.

items.title: Solidarity
items.description: As a charity, we support charitable initiatives linked to the Apulian and Italian community in the UK.

cta.title: Join Us
cta.text: Become part of our community. Together we can keep our Apulian roots alive.
